items.name: Dog 👕
items.description:
More Accessories: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=DreamLabs%20Clothing&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1&IncludeNotForSale


In the wild forest, beneath the full moon, a majestic puppy wolf howls. Its pack gathers near, their spirits unbound. The dog wolf's howl echoes through the night, calling to all the animals in the forest.

Even the werewolves dance in the clouds, their wolf spirits awakened by the full moon. The wolf pack is a wild and untamed force, warriors of the night. Their howling is a primal song, a celebration of life.

Dogs and wolves may be different animals, but they share a deep bond. The dog howls at the moon, its soul connected to the wolf pack.

On this wild night, the wolf's howl is a reminder of the magic that surrounds us.
